meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Passive Income to Solve Scaling Issues
content.seo_description: Stop trading hours for dollars. This beginner checklist helps freelancers build passive income streams using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale effortlessly.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck in freelancing is linear time. By productizing your expertise into micro-SaaS tools using AI-assisted development, you decouple revenue from labor. Use Antigravity to scaffold production-ready backends and Claude Code to automate feature deployment, allowing you to build, ship, and earn passively while you sleep.
content.intro:
You are trapped in the 'delivery treadmill.' Every dollar you earn requires a direct sacrifice of your finite hours, leaving you exhausted and unable to grow. The client work is reliable, but it is a glass ceiling that prevents true financial freedom.

The shift happens when you stop building for clients and start building for the market. By leveraging AI-first development workflows, you can turn your specialized freelance knowledge into automated assets that generate revenue 24/7, effectively breaking the cycle of manual labor.

steps.title: Define Your Micro-SaaS Niche
steps.description: Identify a recurring pain point you solve for clients. Extract the logic into a standalone tool.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my recent freelance project history. Identify 3 repeatable workflows that can be converted into a SaaS tool for other freelancers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze my project history for high-value micro-SaaS opportunities'

steps.title: Scaffold the Backend Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a robust, scalable boilerplate to avoid manual infrastructure setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready SaaS boilerplate using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration for a micro-tool.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate boilerplate with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe'

steps.title: Automate Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to rapidly build out the core functionality of your tool based on your specifications.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a data processing engine that automates [Your Niche Task] and outputs the result in a clean dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Build the core data processing feature for the dashboard'

steps.title: Implement Stripe Subscription Logic
steps.description: Ensure your product is capable of taking payments automatically without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the Stripe webhook handler and subscription management logic for a monthly SaaS billing model.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement Stripe webhooks and subscription billing'

steps.title: Continuous Deployment Workflow
steps.description: Set up an automated CI/CD pipeline so updates are pushed without manual configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure CI/CD pipeline for automated deployment'

pro_tips: Focus on 'utility-first' tools that solve one specific problem perfectly, rather than bloated feature-rich apps.
Use your existing client base as your first beta testers to validate the product before wider marketing.
Always set up automated error logging; passive income dies quickly if the app breaks and you don't know.
Build a 'maintenance-free' stack by relying on serverless architecture to eliminate server management overhead.
Price your tool based on the time it saves the user, not the cost of the development hours you spent building it.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on SEO and cold-outreach to your target demographic to drive your first 10 users.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the blueprint to stop trading time for money. Don't let another month pass building someone else's dream while yours remains a side project. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
